response:
Sec. 1  
peanuts are a type of food that contains proteins which can trigger an allergic reaction in some individuals  
the immune system of people with peanut allergies reacts to the proteins in peanuts and can cause severe reactions  
the body of a person with a peanut allergy is not adapted to the environment underwater  
the lack of peanut proteins in water means that the allergic reaction is not likely to occur  

Sec. 2  
the physical properties of water do not contain the same proteins as peanuts  
the human body is not equipped to handle the chemical composition of water  
the ability to live underwater is not related to the allergic reaction to peanuts
